nasb.text: Jehoash did right in the sight of the Lord all his days in which Jehoiada the priest instructed him.

esv.text: And Jehoash did what was right in the eyes of the Lord all his days, because Jehoiada the priest instructed him.

cnv.text: 在耶何耶大祭司教導他的日子，他就行耶和華看為正的事。

ccb.text: 在耶何耶大祭司的教导下，约阿施一生做耶和华视为正的事。
